str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - algorithmic-thinking
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Overcoming the Challenges of Coding Interviews
entry.summary: In this blog post, we explore practical tips for overcoming the challenges of coding interviews. As coding interviews become increasingly common in the tech industry, it's crucial to be prepared and confident when facing these competitive assessments. From familiarizing yourself with common programming challenges to managing time wisely, learning to communicate effectively, avoiding getting bogged down in implementation details, being prepared to handle edge cases, showcasing problem-solving skills, demonstrating adaptability, and staying calm under pressure, this post provides a comprehensive guide to acing your next coding interview. By following these tips, you can increase your confidence, improve your performance, and stand out as a top talent in the industry. Whether you're a seasoned coder or a recent graduate looking to break into the tech world, these insights should help you perform at your best during your next coding interview.
